title: Neon Tide
artStyle: hand-painted graphic novel realism — realistic proportions and lighting rendered in flat painterly cel-shaded panels, bold shadows, muted cinematic palette, rain-slick neon noir palette
logline: A washed-up investigator takes on a missing-person case in a drowning coastal city, only to realize the client is a liar and the city's corrupt elite want the target dead.

characters.name: Maeve Vance
characters.visualDescription: Sharp, angular jawline, dark hair cut into a severe bob, wearing an expensive emerald trench coat darkened by heavy rain. Her fingers are perpetually stained with dark photographic developer ink.
characters.voiceStyle: Medium-low pitch delivered at a clipped, icy pace with a smoky and bone-dry texture; features a sharp Mid-Atlantic accent and a subtle, metallic throat-click before emphasizing key words.

characters.name: Detective Serrano
characters.visualDescription: Heavy-set build, wearing a wrinkled beige suit and a faded fedora. His left eye is made of cloudy glass that doesn't track, and he smells faintly of cheap menthols and damp wool.
characters.voiceStyle: Low, gravelly baritone delivered at a sluggish, dragging pace with a wet, wheezing texture; features a thick, slurred Brooklyn-dockside accent and a wet, raspy nasal grunt at the end of every sentence.

characters.name: The Baron
characters.visualDescription: A lean, towering figure with a jagged scar running down his neck. He wears an oversized bright yellow fisherman's slicker over a pristine, custom-tailored tuxedo.
characters.voiceStyle: High, reedy tenor with an erratic pace that shifts from rapid whispers to slow drawls; has a whistling, scarred-windpipe texture, a refined Baltic lilt, and a prolonged, hissing sibilance on 'S' sounds.

acts.goal: Expose the deception of your client and find Lily's first location.

beats.summary: You interview Maeve Vance about her missing sister while trying to spot her hidden lies.
beats.sceneHint: Dimly lit office, rain drumming on the blinds, casting slatted shadows across Maeve's face. Neon pink from the street sign colors the wet glass.
choiceHints: Confront Maeve about her nervous lies
Play along to gain Maeve's trust
beats.label: A Nervous Client

beats.summary: You search a dark alley for clues about Lily before a syndicate lookout spots you.
beats.sceneHint: Narrow brick alleyway shimmering with puddle reflections. A flickering yellow light bulb hangs over a dumpster. A lookout smokes a cigarette nearby.
choiceHints: Search the dumpster for clues quietly
Bribe the syndicate lookout with cash
beats.label: The Wet Alley

beats.summary: A guard dog attacks you while you search the docks for Lily's location.
beats.sceneHint: Foggy shipping yard. Red and blue containers stack like monoliths under towering floodlights. A roaring Doberman leaps through the rain.
choiceHints: Climb the rusty crane ladder
Shoot the attacking dog with your taser

qte.stakes: Win to slip inside the container safely; lose to get bitten and captured by Serrano.

beats.label: Container 404

beats.summary: Detective Serrano threatens to revoke your license unless you hand over Maeve's case files.
beats.sceneHint: Diner booth under buzzing fluorescent lights. Serrano slides a wet hand over a plate of cold cherry pie. Rain sheets down the window.
choiceHints: Hand Serrano forged case documents
Threaten Serrano with old blackmail files
beats.label: Serrano's Ultimatum

acts.goal: Infiltrate the Syndicate's headquarters and steal the black ledger.

beats.summary: You must bluff or sneak your way past guards into the syndicate's nightclub.
beats.sceneHint: Outside a glamorous club. A long queue under umbrellas, purple neon lights reflecting off wet asphalt. A massive bouncer in a black suit guards the velvet rope.
choiceHints: Impersonate a wealthy high-rolling investor
Sneak through the greasy kitchen entrance
beats.label: The Neon Pearl

beats.summary: The Baron offers Lily's location if you agree to frame Maeve for embezzlement.
beats.sceneHint: Opulent lounge with velvet walls and a glass floor looking down into a flooded basement. The Baron sips cognac, rain splashing against the skylight above.
choiceHints: Agree to frame Maeve for embezzlement
Steal the Baron's master keycard
beats.label: The Baron's Deal

beats.summary: You must disable a high-voltage alarm before the safe lock locks down permanently.
beats.sceneHint: A dark, wood-paneled office illuminated only by the green glow of a digital safe. Rain lashes against the heavy glass balcony doors.
choiceHints: Hack the system code quickly
Insulate the high-voltage wires carefully
beats.label: Cracking the Safe

beats.summary: Armed syndicate thugs chase you across slippery, wet waterfront rooftops.
beats.sceneHint: Steep metal rooftops slicked with heavy rain. Yellow searchlights sweep across the tiles. Raindrops splash heavily against the camera lens.
choiceHints: Leap across the wet alleyway
Fight the thugs near the water tower

qte.stakes: Win to escape cleanly to the lighthouse; lose to be captured and wounded.

beats.label: Rooftop Flight

acts.goal: Rescue Lily and escape the flooded ruins before the tide takes you.

beats.summary: You must infiltrate the tide-battered cliffside lighthouse where Lily is being held captive.
beats.sceneHint: A towering black stone lighthouse perched on a jagged cliff. Crashing white waves spray the rocks. A violent thunderstorm rages overhead.
choiceHints: Scale the wet cliff face
Disguise yourself as a delivery driver
beats.label: The Crumbling Lighthouse

beats.summary: Maeve corners you and a bound Lily, revealing she intends to destroy the evidence.
beats.sceneHint: A flooded cellar with water up to the knees. Hanging lightbulbs sway wildly. Maeve stands on the stairs holding a silver revolver.
choiceHints: Shield Lily with your body
Dive for Maeve's dropped gun
beats.label: Maeve's True Colors

beats.summary: Detective Serrano's squad arrives to burn the lighthouse down with everyone inside.
beats.sceneHint: Water rises to the chest. Sparking electrical wires hang dangerously close to the tide. Serrano stands in the doorway, weapon raised.
choiceHints: Shoot the exposed electrical box
Throw the evidence ledger to Serrano
beats.label: Serrano's Fire

beats.summary: The collapsing lighthouse floods as you scramble to swim through the escape tunnel.
beats.sceneHint: Submerged stone corridor collapsing. Stone blocks crash into the water, churning up sand and bubbles. A pale circle of moonlight marks the exit.
choiceHints: Drag Lily through the flooded tunnel
Fire a flare to signal the police

qte.stakes: Win to escape the collapsing ruins alive; lose to drown in the dark ocean.

beats.label: The Flooded Tunnel

endings.condition: flags.saved_lily == true AND relationships.Serrano.score < 2 AND flags.evidence_destroyed == false
